/usr/bin/g++-11  -Wnon-virtual-dtor -frounding-math -ffp-contract=off -fopenmp -fPIC -fvisibility=hidden -m64 -O3 -DNDEBUG -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -Wl,--no-undefined CMakeFiles/vorpalite.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vorpalite.dir/__/__/lib/geogram/voronoi/cuda/geo_checkpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vorpalite.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o ../../../bin/vorpalite   -L/home/shadeform/cudageom/geogram-cuda/build_cuda/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shadeform/cudageom/geogram-cuda/build_cuda/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64: -lm -lpthread ../../../lib/libgeogram.so.1.9.9-rc ../../../lib/libgeogram_cuda.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so -lpthread -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
